title: Hybrid vehicle satellite navigation system with integrated contactless payment processing
abstract: A hybrid satellite navigation system consisting of a Bluetooth (RTM) transceiver, 5G/6G (or other Internet connection) transceiver and contactless payment transceiver. The hybrid satellite navigation system will work with a new breed of satellites designed to facilitate wireless payment processing via banking systems' servers. The invention relates to the field of contactless payment processing with particular focus on in-car or in-vehicle contactless payment processing. This in-car or in-vehicle contactless payment processing will be facilitated by the satnav screen in the vehicle and will work seamlessly with contactless credit cards and contactless debit cards.

title: Device for short-circuiting resistor of starter of engine of vehicle to start engine, has external electrodes exposed to outer side of terminal plate, and resistor connected between external electrodes at outer side of terminal plate
abstract: The device has an electromagnetic switch placed in a terminal plate. A pair of electromagnetic switch fixed contacts (6e, 6f) and a pair of fixed contacts (5f, 6f) are connected and disconnected with each other by mobile contacts (5d, 6d) of the electromagnetic switch fixed contacts. External electrodes (6g, 6h) are exposed to outer side of the terminal plate. A resistor (7) is connected between the external electrodes at the outer side of the terminal plate.

title: Compact type high-frequency-ratio double-frequency antenna covering sub-6G and 60GHz
abstract: The utility model discloses a compact large-frequency-ratio double-frequency antenna covering sub-6G and 60GHz. The antenna comprises a dielectric substrate, a broadband monopole, a compact microstripresonance unit, a millimeter wave decoupling patch array, a rectangular metal floor and a lumped port. The broadband monopole is printed on the upper surface of the dielectric substrate and is composed of an annular microstrip line and a microstrip feeder. The compact microstrip resonance unit is connected with the millimeter wave decoupling patch array and the microstrip feeder line; the millimeter wave decoupling patch array comprises millimeter wave patches, rectangular slots and decoupling microstrip lines, the rectangular slots are located in the millimeter wave patches, and the decoupling microstrip lines are located between the millimeter wave patches; the rectangular metal floor is printed on the lower surface of the dielectric substrate; and the lumped port is connected with themi

title: METHOD FOR MANUFACTURING BONDED SUBSTRATE
abstract: Provided is a method for manufacturing a bonded substrate having an excellent thin film over the entire substrate surface, especially even at the vicinity of a bonded end portion. The method for manufacturing the bonded substrate wherein the thin film is provided on a second substrate has at least a step of forming an ion implanted layer by implanting from a surface of a first substrate, i.e., a semiconductor substrate, hydrogen ions or rare gas ions or both types of ions; a step of performing surface activation treatment to at least the first substrate surface wherein ions are implanted or to the bonding surface of the second substrate; a step of bonding the first substrate surface wherein the ions are implanted and the bonding surface of the second substrate with each other, under atmosphere having a humidity of 30% or less and/or a water quantity of 6g/m 3 or less; and a peeling step of separating the first substrate at the ion implanted layer and forming the first substrate in a th

title: DISPLAY DEVICE, DISPLAY DEVICE MANUFACTURING METHOD, DISPLAY DEVICE MANUFACTURING APPARATUS
abstract: A display device (1) comprises a shared hole transport layer (6C) shared by a plurality of subpixels (2R, 2G, 2B) between an anode (4) and light emitting layers (8R, 8G, 8B), and an individual hole transport layer (6P) is individually provided for each of the plurality of subpixels between the common hole transport layer and the light emitting layers. The shared hole transport layer is configured using a first hole transport layer material. A first individual hole transport layer (6B) included in a first-color sub-pixel (2B) is configured using a second hole transport layer material. Second individual hole transport layers (6R, 6G) included in the second-color subpixels (2R, 2G) is configured using a mixed material of the first hole transport layer material and the second hole transport layer material.

title: COFDM wireless broadband ad-hoc network module suitable for complex environment
assignee: POWER EMERGENCY CENTER OF STATE GRID SICHUAN ELECTRIC POWER CORP
abstract: The invention discloses a COFDM wireless broadband ad-hoc network module suitable for a complex environment. The module comprises an enclosure and an ad-hoc network motherboard circuit; the ad-hoc network motherboard circuit comprises a radio frequency receiving unit, a radio frequency interference detection unit, a radio frequency transmitting unit, a broadband radio frequency receiving and sending unit, a baseband unit, an ad hoc network protocol unit, a user interface unit and a low ripple modulus isolation power supply system, the COFDM wireless broadband ad-hoc network module provides throughput of 24M-60Mbps for the system bandwidth and meets any 6-10 hops, the minimum bandwidth between any nodes is greater than the throughput of 3Mbp, the wireless signal baseband meets 300M-6G adjustable requirements and supports FDD frequency hopping and TDD multiplexing connection, the linearity of the wireless signals is high, the anti-interference ability of the automatic radio frequency int

title: Antenna and shell of mobile terminal and mobile terminal
abstract: The invention relates to an antenna and a shell of a mobile terminal and the mobile terminal. The antenna comprises a frame and a main floor biased in the frame, and the frame is provided with a firstside edge. The first side edge of the frame is connected with the main floor through a grounding plate, and the other side edges of the frame are all or partially connected with the main floor. The first side edge is provided with a separation point and a feed point, and the frame is separated by the separation point, the grounding plate and the feed point to form a plurality of antennas. The separation point and the feed point are both arranged on the first side edge, and the grounding plate is also connected with the first side edge, so that the antennas formed on one side of the first sideedge in the frame can cover a large frequency range, can cover various frequencies such as GPS, Low Band, Middle Band and High Band, realize a wide frequency band, and meet the multimode (such as 2G,3G

title: Four-unit MIMO antenna and electronic equipment
abstract: The utility model discloses a four-unit MIMO antenna and an electronic device, the four-unit MIMO antenna is arranged in the electronic device, and comprises a first antenna unit and a fourth antennaunit which are symmetrically arranged and mutually connected, and a second antenna unit and a third antenna unit which are symmetrically arranged and mutually independent; the first antenna unit comprises a first substrate, a first antenna wire and a first grounding part, wherein the first antenna wire and the first grounding part are arranged above the first substrate. The first antenna wire is provided with a first feeding point. The second antenna unit comprises a second substrate, a second antenna wire and a second grounding part, wherein the second antenna wire and the second grounding part are arranged above the second substrate, and the second antenna wire is provided with a second feeding point. title: Sub-6G antenna structure, PCB and mobile terminal
assignee: HUIZHOU TCL MOBILE COMMUNICATION CO LTD
abstract: The invention discloses a Sub-6G antenna structure, a PCB and a mobile terminal. The antenna structure comprises a first branch knot and a second branch knot; the first branch knot comprises an L-shaped arm and a first longitudinal arm extending outwards from the PCB, the first longitudinal arm is connected with the ground of the PCB, and one end of the L-shaped arm is connected with the tail endof the first longitudinal arm; the second branch knot is L-shaped, and one end of the second branch knot is connected with the antenna feed end of the PCB; at least one microstrip line is connected between the first longitudinal arm and the second branch knot. The PCB comprises the antenna structure, and the mobile terminal comprises the PCB. The antenna structure is mainly used for a Sub-6G frequency band of 5G communication equipment, can be directly added on the basis of a PCB component structure of an existing 4G mobile terminal, and meets the requirement of the mobile terminal for the ante

title: Antenna farm intelligent software defined networking enabled dynamic resource controller in advanced networks
abstract: Facilitating antenna farm intelligent software defined networking enabled dynamic resource controller networks (e.g., 5G, 6G, and beyond) is provided herein. Operations of a system can comprise evaluating a condition, the condition being at a mobile device, and a characteristic related to a defined network service associated with a connection to the mobile device. The operations can also comprise selectively modifying a quantity of antennas utilized to provide the connection to the mobile device based on the condition being determined to influence a level of service associated with the defined network service.

title: Silicone rubber material capable of repairing macroscopic scratches, preparation method and application thereof
abstract: The invention discloses a silicone rubber material capable of repairing macroscopic scratches, a preparation method and application thereof. The silicone rubber material comprises the following raw materials by weight: 60-90 parts of amino-terminated silicon rubber, 0.1-50 parts of conductive carbon black, 8-18 parts of diisocyanate, 3-13 parts of a cross-linking agent and 0.1-5 parts of nanoparticles with photo-thermal conversion effect. The preparation method includes: mixing the preparation raw materials with tetrahydrofuran to obtain a prepolymer, and controlling the use amount of the preparation raw materials at 0.1-0.6g/ml according to the volume of the tetrahydrofuran; and drying the prepolymer to obtain the silicone rubber material capable of repairing macroscopic scratches. The application comprises the application to repair of macroscopic scratches and application as 3D printing consumables. The invention has the beneficial effects that: the silicone rubber material has condu

title: Active parking assist system for a motor vehicle
abstract: The invention relates to an active parking assist system (4) for a motor vehicle (2), wherein the parking assist system (4) comprises a plurality of capacitive ultrasonic converters (6a, 6b, 6c, 6d, 6e, 6f, 6g, 6h, 6i, 6j, 6k, 6l, 6m, 6n, 6o) which are essentially spaced evenly in a horizontally circumferential manner outside the motor vehicle (2).

title: Broadband Sub-6G external PCB antenna
assignee: AUDEN COMMUNICATIONS & MULTIMEDIA TECHNO KUNSHAN CO LTD
abstract: The invention discloses a broadband Sub-6G external PCB antenna. The antenna comprises a PCB base material, wherein the surface of the PCB base material is provided with a radiation oscillator, and the surface of the PCB base material is provided with a concave loop oscillator; the radiation oscillator is provided with a resonance gap, and the radiation oscillator is connected with a central feeder line, wherein the central feeder line is provided with a balance-unbalance converter. According to the broadband Sub-6G external PCB antenna, the design is achieved in a limited antenna environmentunder the consideration of the requirements of the Sub-6G frequency band; the PCB base material can be effectively fixed by the positioning holes, thereby enhancing product firmness, and guaranteeingproduct consistency; the resonant frequency can be effectively adjusted, the product size is reduced, the product cost is reduced through the change of the depth of the resonant gap, the center feederli

title: 5G-sub-6G antenna for smart home
abstract: The utility model discloses a 5G-sub-6G antenna for smart home, and belongs to the technical field of antennas. The 5G-sub-6G antenna comprises a PCB, an antenna bracket, an antenna and a plurality ofantenna interfaces, wherein the antenna support is arranged on the PCB, the antenna is arranged on the antenna support and is connected with the PCB, the antenna comprises a plurality of antenna structures, and each of the plurality of antenna structures is correspondingly connected with one of the antenna interfaces. The switchable smart home 5G-sub-6G antenna provided by the utility model has very high gain, and can meet the frequency band requirements of almost all common products.

title: Antenna assembly and mobile terminal
assignee: HUIZHOU TCL MOBILE COMMUNICATION CO LTD
abstract: The invention discloses an antenna assembly and a mobile terminal. The antenna assembly comprises a metal frame body, and at least one breakpoint is arranged in the metal frame body so as to divide the metal frame body into a plurality of frames; a plurality of antennas are integrated at each frame, the antennas integrated at the metal frame body comprise a low-frequency 2*2 MIMO antenna, a medium-high-frequency 4*4 MIMO antenna, a Sub-6G frequency band 4*4 MIMO antenna, a WIFI 2*2 MIMO antenna and a double-frequency GPS antenna; frequency bands of global operators can be covered, antenna performance is good, and mutual influence between antennas is small.

title: PCB antenna
abstract: The utility model discloses a PCB antenna. The PCB antenna comprises an antenna floor, an antenna radiator and a dielectric substrate arranged above the antenna floor. Wherein the antenna radiator comprises an antenna main body and a feed part communicated with the antenna main body, and the antenna main body comprises a first radiation part and a second radiation part; the first radiation part comprises a first body arranged on the front surface of the dielectric substrate, a second body and a third body connected with the tail end of the second body; the first radiation part further comprises a fourth body which is arranged on the reverse side of the dielectric substrate and connected with the third body; the tail end of the first body is provided with a ground feed point, and the tail end of the second body is provided with an antenna signal feed point. title: Detection system of wide-angle camera module
abstract: The invention relates to a divisional application with an application number of 201710669852.3, and discloses a detection system of a wide-angle camera module. The detection system comprises a generation module, an adjustment module, an acquisition module and a determination module, the generation module comprises an acquisition unit and a generation unit; the acquisition unit comprises a first acquisition subunit, a second acquisition subunit, a first generation subunit, a second generation subunit, an adjustment subunit, a third generation subunit, a fourth generation subunit, a fifth generation subunit, a sixth generation subunit, a seventh generation subunit and an eighth generation subunit; and in a first grating curve, a second grating curve, an adjusted first grating curve or an adjusted second grating curve generated by the raw image of the view finding area, the wave crest width and the wave trough width are 1-3 pixel points. title: PERFORMANCE BASED ON INFERRED USER EQUIPMENT DEVICE SPEED FOR ADVANCED NETWORKS
abstract: Facilitating improved performance based on inferred user equipment device speed for advanced networks (e.g., 4G, 5G, 6G, and beyond) is provided herein. Operations of a system can comprise estimating a speed of a user equipment device based on a number of times that a layer indicator associated with the user equipment device changes during a defined period of time. The operations can also comprise selecting a multiple input transmission mode for a transmission to the user equipment device based on the speed of the user equipment device, resulting in a selected transmission mode. A closed loop multiple input transmission mode can be selected in response to the speed being below a defined speed. Alternatively, an open loop multiple input transmission mode can be selected in response to the speed being above the defined speed.

title: GENERATION OF DEMODULATION REFERENCE SIGNALS IN ADVANCED NETWORKS
abstract: Facilitating generation of demodulation reference signals in advanced networks (e.g., 4G, 5G, 6G, and beyond) is provided herein. Operations of a system can comprise evaluating a capability of a mobile device and generating a demodulation reference signal sequence for the mobile device based on the capability of the mobile device. The demodulation reference signal sequence can be a first type based on the capability being a first capability and can be a second type based on the capability being a second capability.

title: GENERATION OF DEMODULATION REFERENCE SIGNALS IN ADVANCED NETWORKS
abstract: Facilitating generation of demodulation reference signals in advanced networks (e.g., 4G, 5G, 6G, and beyond) is provided herein. title: 5G mobile terminal antenna system working in millimeter wave and Sub-6G frequency band and application thereof
abstract: The invention provides a 5G mobile terminal antenna system working in a millimeter wave and a Sub-6G frequency band and an application thereof, and belongs to the technical field of wireless communication and antennas. The antenna system comprises a rectangular metal waveguide cavity, a rectangular radiation slot, a stepped radiation slot and a metal column, and a millimeter-wave antenna and a low-frequency-band antenna coexist and are integrated in a substrate and a frame of a mobile phone so that a win-win situation of a high gain and large coverage is realized without a phased array. The substrate integrated waveguide leaky-wave antenna can work together with a Sub-6G antenna, and the millimeter-wave antenna and the low-frequency antenna are integrated on a mobile phone frame at the same time so that a space is saved. title: Buffer based on inductance frequency extension and sampling front-end circuit thereof
abstract: The invention discloses a buffer based on inductance frequency extension and a sampling front-end circuit thereof. The buffer based on inductance frequency extension comprises a matching circuit, a bias circuit, a source following circuit and an inductance frequency extension circuit, wherein the matching circuit is used for performing impedance matching processing on an input signal to obtain a matching processing signal; the bias circuit is connected with the matching circuit and is used for providing bias voltage for the source following circuit and inputting the matching processing signalinto the source following circuit; the source following circuit is connected with the bias circuit and is used for carrying out signal following processing on the matching processing signal accordingto the bias voltage to obtain a following processing signal; and the inductance frequency extension circuit is connected with the source following circuit and is used for performing signal compensation

The terminal connection part 6a of the positive electrode collector 6 has a penetration hole 6g, and a positive electrode terminal 7 is caulked onto the terminal connection part 6a inserted into the penetration hole 6g, and the terminal connection part of the negative electrode collector has the penetration hole. title: FACILITATING HYBRID AUTOMATIC REPEAT REQUEST RELIABILITY IMPROVEMENT FOR ADVANCED NETWORKS
abstract: Facilitating hybrid automatic repeat request reliability improvement for advanced networks (e.g., 4G, 5G, 6G, and beyond) is provided herein. Operations of a system can comprise obtaining information related to a capability of a user equipment device and configuring the user equipment device with respect to control channel resources and a number of repetitions per slot based on the capability of the user equipment device. The operations can also comprise indicating the control channel resources and the number of repetitions per slot to the user equipment device via a control channel. Further, the operations can comprise detecting an acknowledgement, from the user equipment device, via an uplink control channel that comprises the control channel resources.

title: Random laser
abstract: The invention discloses a random laser. The random laser comprises a pumping source and a fiber network formed by randomly distributing a plurality of optical fibers, each optical fiber comprises a core layer and a cladding layer, the core layer is a PMMA layer (polymethyl methacrylate layer) doped with rhodamine 6G, the cladding layer is a PVDF layer (polyvinylidene fluoride layer), the refractive index of the cladding layer is larger than that of air, and the refractive index of the core layer is larger than that of the cladding layer. The pumping source carries out pumping in an oblique incidence mode, light is effectively coupled at the intersection point of optical fibers in the fiber network through evanescent waves to form a random annular resonant cavity, and stimulated radiation light is subjected to selective gain amplification in the random annular resonant cavity to form laser. According to the invention, while directional output of random laser is ensured, the situation of

title: Buffer based on inductance frequency expansion and sampling front-end circuit of buffer
abstract: The invention discloses a buffer based on inductance frequency expansion and a sampling front-end circuit of the buffer. The buffer comprises a matching circuit, a biasing circuit and an inductance frequency-expanding source follower circuit; the matching circuit is used for performing impedance matching on an input signal to obtain a matching processing signal; the biasing circuit is connected with the matching circuit and is used for providing bias voltage for the inductance frequency-expanding source follower circuit and inputting the matching processing signal into the inductance frequency-expanding source follower circuit; and the inductance frequency-expanding source follower circuit is connected with the biasing circuit and is used for carrying out signal following and compensationprocessing on the matching processing signal according to the bias voltage to obtain an output signal. The buffer based on inductance frequency expansion provided by the invention has extremely high sa

title: 6G mobile communication system based on tensor calculation and data processing method thereof
abstract: The invention relates to a 6G mobile communication system based on tensor calculation and a data processing method thereof. The 6G mobile communication system comprises a high-dimensional informationsource, a tensor compression unit, sending equipment, a channel, receiving equipment, a tensor completion unit and an information sink which are connected in sequence. The tensor compression unit is used for compressing the high-dimensional information source to be transmitted to reduce the information redundancy of the high-dimensional information source. The tensor completion unit is used for supplementing information loss items caused by interference of the complete high-dimensional signals in the transmission process. According to the method, the problem of pain points in a future 6G mobile communication system is solved, compression and completion of high-dimensional data can be achieved, and a good effect is achieved. The method improves the capability of processing high-dimensionalda

title: Method for preparing super-capacitor electrode material through elamine/thiourea and formaldehyde copolymerization method
abstract: The invention relates to a method for preparing a super-capacitor electrode material through an elamine/thiourea and formaldehyde copolymerization method. The method comprises the following preparation steps: enabling 2.8g of elamine and 17.6g of thiourea to be dissolved in 90ml of deionized water, uniformly stirring the mixture in a three-mouth flask for 0.5h, adding 12ml of formaldehyde, and stirring the mixture for 0.5h at an increased speed; slowly adding 0.4ml of concentrated hydrochloric acid through dripping, and performing the reaction for 3h under the temperature of 55 DEG C to obtainsuspending liquid with the milk white color; carrying out the centrifugation of a product: carrying out the centrifugation alternately through ethyl alcohol and deionized water till the liquid supernatant is neutral, and carrying out the drying for 8h; carrying out the carbonization of copolymer under the protection of argon under the temperature of 750 DEG C, and obtaining the super-capacitor ele

title: NETWORK CORE SOFTWARE DEFINED NETWORKING ENABLED ONBOARDING OF MICRO SERVICES FOR AN ADVANCED WIRELESS COMMUNICATIONS SYSTEM
abstract: A network core software defined networking (SDN) enabled onboarding of microservices in a 6G network is provided to enable a one-time registration of a device with a network. Rather than having a core network facilitates establishing communications channels every time a device attaches or connects to the mobile network, the SDN enabled onboarding system disclosed herein can onboard the device, authenticate the device, register the device with the network, and determine addressing for the device. When the device reconnects to the network, the device has already been onboarded, and so the device does not need to go through these steps again, but can rather immediately start communicating with desired network service.

title: SYSTEM MODEL AND ARCHITECTURE FOR MOBILE INTEGRATED ACCESS AND BACKHAUL IN ADVANCED NETWORKS
abstract: Facilitating operation and support of mobile relays based on an integrated access and backhaul concept for advanced networks (e.g., 4G, 5G, 6G, and beyond) is provided. An embodiment relates to a communication network architecture that can comprise a control plane architecture of a relay node device. The control plane architecture can comprise a star-type architecture. Further, the communication network architecture can comprise a user plane architecture of the relay node device. The user plane architecture can be separated from (or independent of) the control plane architecture. Further, the user plane architecture can comprise a multi-hop architecture. The relay node device can be configured to operate according to a fifth generation wireless network communication protocol, or other advanced communication protocols.

title: SYSTEM MODEL AND ARCHITECTURE FOR MOBILE INTEGRATED ACCESS AND BACKHAUL IN ADVANCED NETWORKS
abstract: Facilitating operation and support of mobile relays based on an integrated access and backhaul concept for advanced networks (e.g., 4G, 5G, 6G, and beyond) is provided. title: Antenna structure and terminal device
abstract: The present invention provides an antenna structure and a terminal device. The antenna structure comprises a resonant arm, a first feeder line portion, a first floor, a substrate, a second floor, a second feeder line portion, and at least two radiating pieces, wherein the resonant arm is electrically connected to the first floor through the first feeder line portion; the substrate is attached to the second floor; the second floor is disposed on a side of the substrate close to the first floor; the two ends of the shielding layer of the second feeder line portion are connected to the first floor and the second floor respectively; the at least two radiating pieces are disposed on a side of the substrate away from the second floor; the second feeder line portion wraps a feeder line; and the feeder line is electrically connected to the at least two radiating pieces through the substrate and the second floor. title: FRAMEWORK FOR A 6G UBIQUITOUS ACCESS NETWORK
abstract: A framework for a 6th generation (6G) ubiquitous wireless communications network is provided. A system comprises: a memory that stores executable instructions; and a processor, coupled to the memory, that facilitates execution of the executable instructions to perform operations. The operations comprise: obtaining first information associated with a first condition of a terrestrial radio network of terrestrial radio networks from a terrestrial controller that collects the first information from the terrestrial radio networks; determining second information associated with a resource of a satellite network, wherein the satellite network is integrated with the terrestrial radio networks to form an integrated network to which a mobile device connects, wherein a defined application is alternatively executable at the mobile device via any of a group of networks, the group comprising the satellite network and the terrestrial radio networks; and determining whether to re-assign the defined ap

title: And 4K equipment supports two paths of 6G videos to synthesize one path of 12G video signal
assignee: GUANGZHOU SOKONG ELECTRONIC TECH CO LTD
abstract: The utility model discloses a 4K device supporting two paths of 6G videos to synthesize one path of 12G video signals. The system comprises two 6G video signal acquisition units, two A/D conversion circuits, a 12G video signal synthesis unit, a cache unit, a video signal processing unit, a display unit and a power supply unit. The output end of each 6G video signal acquisition unit is connected with the input end of the corresponding A/D conversion circuit, and the output end of each A/D conversion circuit is connected with one input end of the 12G video signal synthesis unit; the power supplyunit comprises a voltage input end, a switch, a first unidirectional thyristor, a second unidirectional thyristor, a first resistor, a first triode, a second resistor, a first capacitor, a first diode, a second triode, a third potentiometer, a fourth resistor and a voltage output end. title: LTTC BANDPASS FILTER
assignee: AAC ACOUSTIC TECH SHENZHEN CO LTD [CN]
abstract: Provided in the present invention is an LTCC bandpass filter, comprising a shell and a filter assembly accommodated in the shell; the shell comprises a top wall and a bottom wall opposite to the top wall; the filter assembly comprises a first layer, two second layers respectively stacked on the opposite two sides of the first layer, two third layers respectively stacked on the side of the two second layers furthest from the first layer, and a fourth layer sandwiched between one of the second layers and third layers, the first layer serving as an inductor L and the second layers serving as grounded capacitors C, the second layers and the first layer being coupled to collectively form an LC resonance unit, the third layers being grounded and serving as a shielding layer for the LTCC bandpass filter, and the fourth layer being used for introducing electrical cross-coupling of the first layer and the second layers. title: ANTENNA SYSTEM FOR MOBILE TERMINAL, AND MOBILE TERMINAL
assignee: AAC ACOUSTIC TECH SHENZHEN CO LTD [CN]
abstract: An antenna system for a mobile terminal, and a mobile terminal. The antenna system comprises a first antenna group, a second antenna group and a third antenna group which are distributed on the housing; the first antenna group comprises several first antennas, the second antenna group comprises several second antennas, and the third antenna group comprises several third antennas, the operating frequency band of the first antenna being a 4G frequency band, the operating frequency band of the second antenna being a Sub 6G frequency band, and the operating frequency band of the third antenna being a 5G millimeter wave frequency band. The antenna system of the present invention enables implementation of both 4G and 5G mobile communications of a mobile terminal using the antenna system, and provides various signal transmission modes, improving the signal transmission efficiency.

title: ANTENNA SYSTEM AND ELECTRONIC DEVICE
assignee: AAC ACOUSTIC TECH SHENZHEN CO LTD [CN]
abstract: The present invention provides an antenna system, comprising a system ground unit, a metal frame, and a main board. Clearance areas are provided at intervals between the metal frame and the system ground unit; the metal frame is a first radiator; the antenna system further comprises a second radiator, a switch, a capacitor, and a main matching circuit; the second radiator is located in the clearance area; the main board comprises a feed point; the metal frame comprises a first connection portion and a second connection portion; one end of the capacitor is connected to the second radiator, and the other end is connected to the main matching circuit; the second radiator is connected to the main board by means of the switch. title: ANTENNA SYSTEM FOR MOBILE TERMINAL AND MOBILE TERMINAL
abstract: An antenna system for a mobile terminal and a mobile terminal are provided. The antenna system includes a first antenna group, a second antenna group and a third antenna group distributed on a housing, where the first antenna group includes a plurality of first antennas, the second antenna group includes a plurality of second antennas, the third antenna group includes a plurality of third antennas, the first antennas operates at a 4G band, the second antennas operates at a Sub 6G band, and the third antennas operates at a 5G millimeter-wave band. According to the antenna system of the present disclosure, the mobile terminal applying the antenna system can realize 4G and 5G mobile communications at the same time, and have multiple signal transmission modes and improve the signal transmission efficiency.

title: Cellular system
abstract: A system includes a housing with one or more edge processors to handle processing on behalf of a mobile target or to provide local data to the mobile target or to provide artificial intelligence for the mobile target; one or more antennas coupled to the housing; and a processor to control a directionality of the antennas in communication with the mobile target using 5G or 6G protocols.

title: Broadband Sub-6G external PCB (Printed Circuit Board) antenna
assignee: AUDEN COMMUNICATIONS & MULTIMEDIA TECHNO KUNSHAN CO LTD
abstract: The utility model discloses a broadband Sub-6G external PCB (Printed Circuit Board) antenna. The antenna comprises a PCB base material, the surface of the PCB base material is provided with a radiation oscillator, the surface of the PCB base material is provided with a concave loop oscillator, the radiation oscillator is provided with a resonance gap, the radiation oscillator is connected with a central feeder line, and the central feeder line is provided with a balance-unbalance converter. The utility model relates to a broadband Sub-6G external PCB (printed circuit board) antenna. Accordingto the design, the requirements of the Sub-6G frequency band are considered; the method is realized in a limited antenna environment. The PCB base material can be effectively fixed by the positioningholes; enhancing product firmness, product consistency is guaranteed, the resonant frequency can be effectively adjusted, the product size is reduced, the product cost is reduced through the change ofth

title: CAMERA MONITORING SYSTEM
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a CMS (Camera Monitoring System) capable of achieving power saving while ensuring safety.SOLUTION: The camera monitoring system includes: imaging means (side cameras 1L, 1R) for imaging the outside of a car CAR; display means (side monitors 2L, 2R) for displaying an imaged image: detection means 6G, 6E, 6T, 6D.6S for detecting a state of an engine switch, a state of an engine, a state of a gear shift, opening and closing states of a door and a seating state of a driver; and control means 3, 4, 5 for controlling power consumption of the imaging means and the display means on the basis of a detection output of the detection means, and controls the imaging means and the display means to be a low-consumption power state when a predetermined time elapses after the detection output of the detection means changes.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

title: And 4K equipment for converting two paths of 6G videos into four paths of 3G video signals is supported
assignee: GUANGZHOU SOKONG ELECTRONIC TECH CO LTD
abstract: The utility model relates to the field of video signal conversion. The utility model discloses 4K equipment for converting two paths of 6G videos into four paths of 3G video signals. The system comprises two paths of 6G video signal acquisition modules, two paths of A/D conversion circuits, a 6G-to-3G video distributor, a cache module, four paths of video signal processing modules, four paths of display modules and a power supply module, the output end of each 6G video signal acquisition module is connected with the input end of the A/D conversion circuit, and the output end of each A/D conversion circuit is connected with the input end of the 6G-to-3G video distributor; the power supply module comprises a first resistor, a second resistor, a first triode, a second triode, a third resistor, a first power supply, a second power supply, a switch, a first MOS tube, a fourth resistor, a fifth resistor, a second MOS tube, a sixth resistor, a third MOS tube and a voltage output end. title: 6G scheduling information protection method and system
abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of information processing, and discloses a 6G scheduling information protection method and system, and the method comprises the steps: setting a 6G scheduling information protection channel in a 2.4 G frequency band, and enabling different APs to periodically utilize the protection channel to transmit redundant scheduling information; trigger frame utilization HE- SIG If the B field schedules 2.4 G downlink, 6G uplink and downlink scheduling information is packaged into a Trigger frame load part; if the Trigger frame schedules 2.4 G uplink, packaging 6G uplink and downlink scheduling information in the HE-; sIG A part B; and after the same sequence code is received again in the 6G frequency band, uplink transmission is carried out. According to the method, 2.4 G uplink and downlink scheduling information and 6G uplink and downlink scheduling information are simultaneously contained in the Trigger frame, the scheduling overhead is reduced,the

title: Communication system and communication method
assignee: GUANGZHOU KAIXIN COMMUNICATION SYSTEM CO LTD
abstract: The application relates to a communication system and a communication method. The communication system comprises an access unit used for receiving an initial downlink signal sent by a signal source, converting the initial downlink signal into a downlink interface signal and sending the downlink interface signal to at least one expansion unit, an extension unit being connected with the access unitand being used for receiving the downlink interface signal, converting the downlink interface signal into a downlink signal of a millimeter wave frequency band and sending the downlink signal of the millimeter wave frequency band to at least one remote unit, and the remote unit being connected with the expansion unit and being used for receiving the downlink signal of the millimeter wave frequencyband, converting the downlink signal of the millimeter wave frequency band into a target downlink radio frequency signal and sending the target downlink radio frequency signal to user equipment. By the

title: Two-stage temperature adjusting system based on organic heat carrier critical temperature
abstract: The invention provides a two-stage temperature adjusting system based on organic heat carrier critical temperature. The system can supply continuous and stable heating/cooling/constant temperature regulation to large or multi-layer or multiple production lines under the organic heat carrier critical temperature of 410 DEG C, and the adjustment error during continuous heat supply or cooling is smaller than 0.5 DEG C, and by adopting the two-stage temperature regulating technological process, energy consumption is lowered by 30-40%. While energy consumption is greatly lowered, by means of high-temperature and stable convective heat transfer, and due to the fact that the technological curve is smooth, and the temperature radian is small, the thermal uniformity of large-specification hot discsof large multi-layer thermal presses or multiple thermal presses can be kept within 0.5-1.0 DEG C. The two-stage temperature adjusting system can meet the production machining requirements of large,mu

title: Antenna structure and electronic equipment
abstract: The invention provides an antenna structure and electronic equipment, the antenna structure comprises a first antenna, a second antenna, a first tuning circuit and a second tuning circuit, the first antenna comprises a first antenna body, the second antenna comprises a second antenna body, and a fracture is formed between the first antenna body and the second antenna body; a first end of the firsttuning circuit is connected with the first antenna body, a second end of the first tuning circuit is grounded, and the first tuning circuit is used for exciting the first antenna to generate first resonance; a first end of the second tuning circuit is connected with the second antenna body, a second end of the second tuning circuit is grounded, and the second tuning circuit is used for exciting the second antenna to generate second resonance, wherein the frequency band of the first resonance and the frequency band of the second resonance are Sub-6G frequency bands. According to the scheme prov

title: Truncation convolution coding optimization construction method
assignee: INST OF WAR ACADEMY OF MILITARY SCIENCES PLA CHINA
abstract: The invention discloses a truncation convolution coding optimization construction method. The method comprises the following steps: constructing a protograph and a basis matrix of a truncation convolution LDPC extension code set; obtaining a decoding threshold of a truncated convolutional LDPC extension code set through iterative computation; optimizing and reducing the decoding time delay of thetruncated convolution LDPC extended code set through iterative search; and constructing the check matrix of the truncated convolution LDPC extension code. According to the invention, the truncated convolution LDPC extension code suitable for 5G and 6G heterogeneous cellular network pulse channels is constructed, the transmission reliability of data on the pulse channels can be effectively improved, and the transmission time delay is reduced.

title: Data transmission structure, identification terminal and gate
assignee: CHONGQING ZHONGKE YUNCONG TECH CO LTD
abstract: The utility model belongs to the field of security and protection equipment, and particularly relates to a data transmission structure, an identification terminal and a gate. The data transmission structure comprises a grounding assembly, a mainboard and an antenna mechanism connected with the mainboard, and the antenna mechanism at least comprises one of a WiFi antenna, a main antenna and an auxiliary antenna; wherein the main antenna is a 4G, 5G or 6G main antenna, the auxiliary antenna is a 4G, 5G or 6G auxiliary antenna, the grounding end of the WiFi antenna is connected with the groundingassembly, and the grounding end of the main antenna is connected with the grounding assembly; and the grounding end of the auxiliary antenna is connected with the grounding assembly. The beneficial effects of the utility model are that mutual interference among the antennas of the antenna mechanism is avoided, and effective transmission of data is ensured.

title: Sending and receiving method and device
abstract: The invention discloses a sending method, which comprises the following steps of respectively setting a segment list corresponding to each intermediate node, or respectively setting selectable type length value objects corresponding to each intermediate node, and containing the set segment lists or selectable type length value objects in an SRH of an IPv6 segment routing SRv6 data packet, and sending the SRv6 data packet. The invention also discloses a receiving method, which comprises the following steps of receiving a sixth-generation internet protocol IPv6 segment routing SRv6 data packet,analyzing the segment list, determining processing to be carried out according to parameters contained in the segment list corresponding to the intermediate node, and carrying out the processing, or analyzing the selectable type length value object, determining the processing to be carried out according to each parameter contained in the selectable type length value object corresponding to the inte

title: Electric storage device based on small organic molecule dye and preparation method of electric storage device
abstract: The invention discloses an electric storage device based on a small organic molecule dye and a preparation method of the electric storage device. The preparation method comprises the following steps:dissolving rhodamine B or rhodamine 6G in absolute ethyl alcohol, and coating a substrate with the rhodamine B or rhodamine 6G solution completely dissolved in absolute ethyl alcohol to prepare an organic film layer; and then preparing an electrode on the organic film layer to obtain the electric storage device based on the small organic molecule dye. The organic small molecule rhodamine B or rhodamine 6G is dissolved in absolute ethyl alcohol to prepare the organic electric storage device of a sandwich structure, the organic electric storage behavior is successfully achieved, no reaction is needed before preparation, the preparation process is simple, only spin coating is needed, the device environment is sound, and high-temperature stability is high.

title: FAST MULTI-BEAM LISTEN BEFORE TALK
abstract: Facilitating fast multi-beam listen before talk in advanced networks (e.g., 4G, 5G, 6G, and beyond) is provided herein. Operations of a device can comprise determining a first inactivity in a first beam based on a first performance of a first listen before talk procedure in the first beam and, based on determining the first inactivity, analyzing a presence of an activity in a second beam based on a second performance of a second listen before talk procedure in the second beam. Further, the operations can comprise, based on determining a lack of the presence of the activity in the second beam, transmitting a signal via the second beam. In an example, analyzing the presence of the activity in the second beam can be performed prior to completion of the determining the first inactivity in the first beam.

title: FACILITATING IMPROVED PERFORMANCE OF MULTIPLE DOWNLINK CONTROL CHANNELS IN ADVANCED NETWORKS
abstract: Facilitating improved performance of multiple downlink control channels in advanced networks (e.g., 4G, 5G, 6G, and beyond) is provided herein. Operations of a system can comprise scheduling multiple data traffic channels for a user equipment device. Scheduling the multiple data channels can comprise scheduling a first data traffic channel of the multiple data traffic channels based on a legacy scheduling procedure and scheduling a second data traffic channel of the multiple data traffic channels based on an iterative procedure. The operations can also comprise transmitting, to the user equipment device, first information via multiple downlink control channels and transmitting, to the user equipment device, second information via the multiple data traffic channels.

title: FACILITATING SELECTION OF DEMODULATION REFERENCE SIGNAL PORTS IN ADVANCED NETWORKS
abstract: Facilitating selection of demodulation reference signal port combinations in advanced networks (e.g., 4G, 5G, 6G, and beyond) is provided herein. Operations of a system can comprise evaluating a capability of a mobile device. The operations can also comprise assigning a first group of port combinations for the mobile device based on the capability of the mobile device being a first capability and a second group of port combinations for the mobile device based on the capability of the mobile device being a second capability, resulting in a port combination assignment. The port combination assignment can mitigate a peak-to-average power ratio value.

title: FACILITATING IMPROVED PERFORMANCE OF MULTIPLE DOWNLINK CONTROL CHANNELS IN ADVANCED NETWORKS
abstract: Facilitating improved performance of multiple downlink control channels in advanced networks (e.g., 4G, 5G, 6G, and beyond) is provided herein. Operations of a system can comprise scheduling multiple data traffic channels for a user equipment device. Scheduling the multiple data channels can comprise scheduling a first data traffic channel of the multiple data traffic channels based on a legacy scheduling procedure and scheduling a second data traffic channel of the multiple data traffic channels based on an iterative procedure. The operations can also comprise transmitting, to the user equipment device, first information via multiple downlink control channels and transmitting, to the user equipment device, second information via the multiple data traffic channels.

title: FACILITATING SELECTION OF DEMODULATION REFERENCE SIGNAL PORTS IN ADVANCED NETWORKS
abstract: Facilitating selection of demodulation reference signal port combinations in advanced networks (e.g., 4G, 5G, 6G, and beyond) is provided herein. Operations of a system can comprise evaluating a capability of a mobile device. The operations can also comprise assigning a first group of port combinations for the mobile device based on the capability of the mobile device being a first capability and a second group of port combinations for the mobile device based on the capability of the mobile device being a second capability, resulting in a port combination assignment. The port combination assignment can mitigate a peak-to-average power ratio value.

title: DEVICE CONTEXTS, OPERATIONAL MODES, AND POLICY DRIVEN ENHANCEMENTS FOR PAGING IN ADVANCED NETWORKS
abstract: Facilitating device contexts, operational modes, and policy driven enhancements for paging in advanced networks (e.g., 4G, 5G, 6G, and beyond) is provided herein. Operations of a network device can comprise analyzing a group of contextual data for a user equipment device, and mobility management behaviors historically implemented for the user equipment device and based on an indication that a page request is scheduled to be sent to the user equipment device. The operations can also comprise configuring a paging message for the user equipment device based on the contextual data and the mobility management behaviors. Further, the operations can comprise sending the paging message to the user equipment device.

title: Film random laser based on environment humidity tuning wavelength
abstract: The invention provides a film random laser device based on environmental humidity tuning wavelength. The laser device comprises rhodamine 6g, silver nano flower particles, a cured chitosan-glycerol film and a glass substrate, wherein the silver nanoflower particles and rhodamine 6g are dispersed in the cured chitosan-glycerol film, and the cured chitosan-glycerol film covers the glass substrate toform the random laser device. According to the invention, the chitosan-glycerol film has good water absorption, the output wavelength of the random laser can be tuned by changing the humidity of thesurrounding environment of the random laser, and the characteristics of flexibility and active interaction with the environment are achieved.

title: 5G/6G optical device full-temperature automatic test system and method
abstract: The invention provides a 5G/6G optical device full-temperature automatic test system and method, and the system comprises: an optical device drive board which is used for driving a to-be-tested 5G/6Goptical device, and meetsthe test conditions of a high-speed signal; ahigh-low temperature circulating box which is used for placing the to-be-tested 5G/6G optical device, so that the to-be-tested 5G/6G optical device is correspondingly tested in a full-temperature environment; anLIV tester, aspectrograph and ahigh-speed network analyzer which are used for testing LIV characteristics, spectral characteristics and high-speed network analysis parameters of the to-be-tested 5G/6G optical device in a full-temperature environment; acomputer which is connected with and drives the LIV tester, the spectrograph and the high-speed network analyzer to perform test actions; and apower supply which provides working current for the to-be-tested 5G/6G optical device, the LIV tester, the spectrograph, theh

title: City inside and outside and land and sea mixed scene propagation method for future mobile communication
abstract: The invention discloses a city inside and outside and land and sea mixed propagation method for future mobile communication. The method comprises the following steps: reading scene topography and landform; determining boundary conditions; according to a three-dimensional parabolic equation algorithm; simulating urban internal and external and mixed scene path loss and field distribution under a 5Gor 6G frequency band; reasonably deploying a base station; wherein the boundary condition determination is specifically as follows: determining an upper boundary condition of radio wave propagation determined by an atmospheric refractive index; determining a lower boundary condition determined by the surface; wherein the three-dimensional parabolic equation algorithm can specifically comprise thefollowing steps: determining a current source; determining an initial magnetic field according to the excitation source; determining a stepping magnetic field according to the initial magnetic field;em

title: Wireless network card
abstract: The utility model discloses a wireless network card. Mainboard comprising PCB, wherein a USB interface and an SIM card seat are arranged on the PCB main board, an SIM card is placed in the SIM card seat, and the slot antenna is characterized in that a square slot window is formed in the inner layer of the PCB main board below the SIM card, a three-finger type feed network is arranged on the PCB main board, and coupled feed is carried out on the slot window to form the slot antenna. The size of the square window is larger than that of the SIM card, and the radiation gain of the antenna at the high-frequency part is changed by adjusting the size of the square window and the distance from the square window to the edge of the SIM card. And the slot antenna works at a plurality of frequency points of 0.8-6G. And the slot antenna works at a working frequency point of 0.8 GHz to 0.9 GHz and a working frequency point of 2.4 GHz of the WLAN. According to the wireless network card of the utility

title: Graphene/monatomic layer GaS/GaAs radio generator and manufacturing method thereof
abstract: The invention relates to a radio power generation device and discloses a graphene/monatomic layer GaS/gallium arsenide radio generator. A layer of monatomic layer GaS is formed on a gallium arsenide substrate passivated by ammonium sulfide, a layer of graphene is attached to the layer of monatomic layer GaS, a first electrode and a side electrode are arranged, and the graphene is in direct contactwith a monatomic layer gallium sulfide surface of gallium arsenide to form a heterojunction. The key point of the generator lies in that graphene contacts gallium arsenide passivated by ammonium sulfide to form a Schottky junction and a Schottky barrier, t radio frequency waves (sub-6G) emitted by an emission source can be collected, the quantum property of the radio frequency waves stimulates hot electrons in the graphene, and a tunneling process occurs to form a current. External radio frequency waves are directly converted into direct-current electric energy, and electric energy can be prov

title: Wireless radio frequency circuit of wireless network bridge
abstract: The utility model discloses a wireless radio frequency circuit of a wireless network bridge. The circuit comprises a chip 6G, a radio frequency amplifier U3, a radio frequency amplifier U4, a filter U1 and a filter U16. The B59 pin of the chip 6G is connected with the 4 pin of the radio frequency amplifier U3, the A69 pin of the chip 6G is connected with the 4 pin of the radio frequency amplifierU4, the A65 pin of the chip 6G is connected with the 16 pin of the radio frequency amplifier U3, and the B57 pin of the chip 6G is connected with the 16 pin of the radio frequency amplifier U4. According to the wireless radio frequency circuit of the wireless network bridge, the radio frequency amplification circuit is additionally arranged at the network signal output end, so that signals are amplified step by step, and radio frequency power output which is large enough is obtained; and the amplified radio frequency signal is filtered by the filter circuit, so that the signal frequency is stab

title: Intelligent LED garden lamp and intelligent lighting method thereof
assignee: DONGGUAN PERFECT SCIENCE & TECH CO LTD
abstract: The invention discloses an intelligent LED garden lamp and an intelligent lighting method thereof. The street lamp comprises a lamp post, a main lamp wall, an auxiliary lamp wall, an LED lamp holder,an LED module, an LED lantern, a centralized controller, a storage battery box, a 5G/6G base station antenna and a power generation device, wherein a light sensation sensor is arranged on the centralized controller; a storage battery is arranged in the storage battery box; a single lamp controller is arranged in the LED lamp holder, the LED module and the LED lantern respectively; the centralizedcontroller is electrically connected with the three single lamp controllers, the storage battery, the 5G/6G base station antenna and the power generation device; and the storage battery is electrically connected with the power generation device. The LED garden lamp has the advantages that the three types of LED light source components are suitable for illumination of carriageways, sidewalks and fest

title: INFRARED RADIATION HEAT SOURCE DEVICE USING ELECTRIC HEATING THIN WIRE COIL
abstract: To improve earthquake proof performance of a winding coil used for an infrared radiation heat source device, and simplify and miniaturize a splicing structure.SOLUTION: An infrared radiation heat source device is structured by: a splicing connection plate 6 by a metal thin plate in which a splicing terminal 6f and an external connection terminal 6g are molded; an insulation holding body 7 that insulation-holds the splicing terminal 6f and the external connection terminal 6g; and an electric heating thin wire coil 1 heated by an electric conduction. A coil trunk part 1a of the electric heating thin wire coil 1 has an approximate circular cylindrical heat generation surface, and mainly has an infrared radiation to a right angle direction to a center axis of a coil. Therefore, when the electric heating thin wire coil 1 is vertically arranged for a mounted tag, a main output direction of the infrared radiation becomes a horizontal surface direction of a mounting substrate, and is discharge
